title: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Industry Leading Noise Canceling Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation technology with Auto NC Optimizer. Crystal clear hands-free calling with 8 microphones. Up to 30-hour battery life with quick charging (3 min charge = 3 hours playback). Multipoint connection — connect to two Bluetooth devices simultaneously. Premium sound with Integrated Processor V1.

title: Apple AirPods Pro (2nd Generation) with USB-C Charging Case
description: Active Noise Cancellation removes up to 2x more background noise. Adaptive Audio dynamically blends Noise Cancellation and Transparency. Personalized Spatial Audio with dynamic head tracking. Up to 30 hours total listening time.

title: Samsung 65" QLED 4K Smart TV (QN65Q80C) — 2024 Model
description: Quantum Processor 4K powered by AI upscaling. 100% Color Volume with Quantum Dot technology. Real Depth Enhancer Pro and Contrast Enhancer. Auto Game Mode (FreeSync Premium Pro) for ultra-smooth gaming. Object Tracking Sound+ for immersive 3D audio.

title: Apple iPad (10th Gen) 64GB Wi-Fi — Blue
description: A14 Bionic chip for fast performance. 10.9-inch Liquid Retina display with True Tone. 12MP front and rear cameras. USB-C connectivity. All-day 10-hour battery. Works with Apple Pencil and Magic Keyboard Folio.

title: Google Pixel 8 Pro 128GB Unlocked — Obsidian
description: Google Tensor G3 chip. 50MP main camera with Telephoto and Ultrawide. Best Take, Photo Unblur, and Magic Eraser AI features. 7 years of OS updates. 24-hour battery. Temperature sensor.

title: Ninja Foodi 14-in-1 8qt XL Pressure Cooker & Air Fryer
description: TenderCrisp Technology — pressure cook then air fry for crispness. 14 cooking functions: sauté, steam, slow cook, sous vide, and more. Fits 8lbs of chicken or a 7lb rack of ribs. Dishwasher-safe parts. Includes 45 recipes.

title: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum Cleaner — Absolute
description: Laser Detect reveals invisible dust on hard floors. Built-in LCD screen shows real-time performance data. HEPA filtration captures 99.99% of particles. Up to 60 minutes run time. Automatically adapts suction to the surface type.

title: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker, 8 Quart
description: 7-in-1 multi-use: pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice maker, yogurt maker, steamer, sauté, and warmer. Up to 70% faster than traditional cooking. 14 one-touch programs. Dishwasher-safe lid and inner pot.

title: KitchenAid Artisan 5-Qt Stand Mixer — Empire Red
description: 10 speeds to gently knead, whip, and mix. Tilt-head design for easy bowl access. 59-point planetary mixing action. Includes flat beater, dough hook, and wire whip. Hub powers over 10 optional attachments.

title: Ninja Professional Plus Kitchen System with Auto-iQ Blender
description: 1200-peak-watts of performance power. Total Crushing Technology obliterates ice and frozen fruit. Auto-iQ programs for hands-free blending. Nutrient and vitamin extraction with the Nutri Ninja cups.

title: Shark AI Ultra Robot Vacuum with XL Self-Empty Base
description: HEPA self-empty base holds up to 60 days of dirt. AI Laser Vision for precise home mapping. IQ Nav+ obstacle avoidance. 2-in-1 vacuum and mop in one pass. Works with Alexa and Google Assistant.

title: Nike Air Max 270 React Men's Shoes — Black/White
description: Combines Max Air and React foam for ultimate comfort. The tallest Air heel unit in Nike running history. Lightweight mesh upper with synthetic overlays. Rubber outsole absorbs impact for a smooth, cushioned ride.

title: Nike Air Force 1 '07 Women's Shoes — Triple White
description: The legend lives on in the Nike Air Force 1. Originally designed for the hardwood, the AF1 now brings a fresh look with the same bold design. Leather upper. Padded collar. Full-length Air-Sole unit.

title: Adidas Ultraboost 22 Running Shoes — Men's
description: Made with 50% Parley Ocean Plastic. Responsive BOOST midsole for exceptional energy return. Continental rubber outsole for superior grip. Lightweight Linear Energy Push system. Sock-like Primeknit+ upper.

title: H&M Slim-Fit Stretch Suit — Navy Blue
description: Smart and timeless slim-fit suit jacket. Notch lapels, flap pockets, and double-button cuffs. Matching flat-front trousers with slim fit. Stretch fabric for all-day comfort. Machine washable.

title: Zara Oversized Linen Blazer — Ecru
description: Relaxed oversized cut in a lightweight linen blend. Lapel collar, long sleeves, and welt pockets. Button front fastening. Fully lined. Pairs perfectly with matching linen trousers.

title: Levi's Men's 501 Original Fit Jeans — Dark Stonewash
description: The original and iconic straight leg since 1873. Button fly. 5-pocket styling. Made with 99% cotton for a lived-in feel. Regular fit with room to move. Machine washable.

title: Bowflex SelectTech 552 Adjustable Dumbbells (Pair)
description: Adjusts from 5 to 52.5 lbs. Dial System for quick weight changes. 15 sets of weights in 1 compact design. Includes workout DVD and exercise instructions. Replaces 15 sets of dumbbells.

title: Garmin Forerunner 255 GPS Running Smartwatch
description: Advanced running metrics with daily suggested workouts. Up to 14 days battery life. Multi-band GPS for pinpoint accuracy. Health Snapshot for key health stats in 2 minutes. Morning report and daily training suggestions.

title: LEGO Technic Ferrari Daytona SP3 — 3778 Pieces
description: Recreate the iconic Ferrari SP3 in stunning detail. Opening doors and hood, moveable steering wheel, V12 engine with moving pistons, and detailed cockpit. An engineering challenge for ages 18+.
